nodes.name: Send Typing Indicator
nodes.notes: Typing indicator expires after 5 seconds. continueOnFail=true so a typing blip never blocks the response.

nodes.name: Resolve Identity (Chat)
nodes.notes: Calls 03-01 Identity Resolver. Returns person_id, display_name, is_new.

nodes.name: Execute Core Agent
nodes.notes: Points to 02-03-core-agent workflow (created in Plan 02-02). Will error until that workflow exists and its ID is set.

nodes.name: Resolve Identity (Cmd)
nodes.notes: Calls 03-01 Identity Resolver for commands path. Commands also need a person_id.

parameters.query: SELECT pi.platform, pi.platform_user_id, pi.username, p.display_name FROM platform_identities pi JOIN persons p ON p.id = pi.person_id WHERE pi.person_id = $1

parameters.text: ={{ $json.reply_text }}

parameters.query: UPDATE persons SET display_name = $1 WHERE id = $2

parameters.text: ={{ 'Display name updated to: *' + $('Merge person_id (Cmd)').item.json.command_args.join(' ') + '*' }}
Usage: !profile name <your display name>

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pending_links (code, person_id, platform, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)

parameters.text: ={{ 'Your link code is: *' + $('Generate Link Code').item.json.verification_code + '*\n\nRun `/link code:' + $('Generate Link Code').item.json.verification_code + '` in Discord within 10 minutes.' }}

parameters.query: SELECT pl.person_id::text as source_person_id, pl.platform as source_platform FROM pending_links pl WHERE pl.code = $1 AND pl.expires_at > NOW()

parameters.text: Code not found or expired. Run `!link` again to get a new code.
These accounts are already linked.

parameters.query: UPDATE platform_identities SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE conversations SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE messages SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE memories SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE persons SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
DELETE FROM pending_links WHERE code = $1

parameters.text: Accounts linked! Your Telegram and Discord identities are now unified.

parameters.query: SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM platform_identities WHERE person_id = $1
DELETE FROM platform_identities WHERE platform = 'telegram' AND person_id = $1

parameters.text: Unlinked. Your Telegram account is now independent. History is preserved under your previous unified profile.
No linked account to unlink — you only have one platform connected.
Unknown command. Available: !link, !unlink, !profile name <name>, !status

nodes.name: Get File Info
nodes.notes: Calls Telegram Bot API getFile to resolve file_id → file_path. continueOnFail handles no-attachment case.

nodes.name: Merge File URL
nodes.notes: Constructs Telegram file download URL and merges into attachment. Falls back gracefully if getFile failed.
